description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that defines linting settings: ignore the directories doc, examples, and futures; disable the PEP8 rules E501, E116, and E402; set pyflakes to not run; set strictness to verylow; and declare that the project uses Django. No jobs, stages, Docker images, services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified. This configuration only provides static analysis options for the pipeline.
